mechanism_narrative: A stable or declining FEDFUNDS rate at historically low levels (near 0.4%) signals continued accommodative policy, lowering the equity discount rate and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level/trend and forward 20d returns stays below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns following flat/declining FEDFUNDS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (p>0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window from a low base near 5.0%, it signals an inflection toward labor market deterioration that precedes broader economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: In triggered instances, forward 60d SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of cases, or the mean triggered return is not significantly below the unconditional mean (p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) and HOUST (housing starts) reflects broad-based consumer and housing demand strength that jointly signal robust near-term corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month; neither series alone carries the same signal strength.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger instances show forward 20d returns not statistically distinguishable from single-series trigger instances (interaction term insignificant, p>0.10), or Rank IC of the joint signal below 0.03 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion regime, decelerating INDPRO growth signals approaching capacity constraints and margin compression that erode forward equity returns over the next quarter, while the same deceleration is benign in early/mid-cycle regimes.
failure_condition: The negative return association fails to replicate outside identified late-cycle periods, or forward 60d returns following the trigger in late-cycle windows are not significantly negative (p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent month-over-month growth in PAYEMS reflects ongoing labor market expansion that supports consumer income and near-term equity sentiment, producing a modest positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the following trading week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following positive PAYEMS prints are not significantly different from returns following flat/negative prints (p>0.10) over a 3-year rolling sample.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains near zero while CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates above trend, real policy rates turn increasingly negative, creating an environment where investors rotate into equities as a real-return hedge, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month; this effect requires both conditions jointly.
regime_hint: zero lower bound with rising inflation
failure_condition: Joint-condition periods show forward 20d returns statistically indistinguishable from periods with low FEDFUNDS alone (interaction coefficient insignificant, p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-recovery regime where HOUST has risen for at least two consecutive quarters from a depressed base, continued housing starts growth signals durable multi-quarter demand momentum that supports positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter; in a housing-oversupply or declining regime the same growth carries no signal.
failure_condition: Forward 60d returns in triggered housing-recovery regime windows are not significantly higher than in non-recovery regime windows with the same HOUST growth rate (p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous weakening in INDPRO and PAYEMS growth within the same reporting month signals a synchronized supply-and-labor slowdown that markets underprice in the very short term, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next trading week; each series alone shows weaker predictive power.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO MoM < 0 AND PAYEMS MoM growth < prior 6mo average
failure_condition: Joint-trigger 5d forward returns are not significantly more negative than single-series-trigger returns (interaction term insignificant, p>0.10), or Rank IC below 0.03 over rolling 2-year windows.
